nasb.text: There was war at Gath again, where there was a man of great stature who had six fingers on each hand and six toes on each foot, twenty-four in number; and he also had been born to the giant.

esv.text: And there was again war at Gath, where there was a man of great stature, who had six fingers on each hand, and six toes on each foot, twenty-four in number, and he also was descended from the giants.

cnv.text: 在迦特又有一場戰事，那裡有一個身量高大的人，手腳都各有六個指頭，總數是二十四個；這人也是巨人所生的。

ccb.text: 在迦特的一次交战中，有一个非利士巨人每只手脚各有六个手指和脚趾，共二十四个手指和脚趾。
